mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( order_num, user_id, total_amount, status, receiver_name, receiver_phone, receiver_address, create_time, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNum}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverAddress}, NOW(), #{remark} )

INSERT INTO order_item ( order_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity, product_image ) VALUES ( #{orderId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPrice}, #{quantity}, #{productImage} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `user` SET money = money + #{money} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
